name: Blair East
address: 1220 East West Highway, Silver Spring, MD 20910
notes: 17-story LEED Platinum certified high-rise, built 2012, 394 units
24-hour front desk/concierge confirmed across multiple sources
Laundry situation is conflicting: one source says in-unit washer/dryer, another says washer/dryer connections only (hookups), a third says shared laundry on every floor; verify on tour
Balcony confirmed as unit amenity; described as private balcony or patio
Pool listed in some aggregator summaries but not in per-listing amenity details; not confirmed
Fitness center with yoga room confirmed; dog grooming area and pet park on site
Climate control details (in-unit thermostat vs building-controlled) not found in any source
Pets allowed; max 2 pets, $250 deposit per pet, $45/month per pet, breed restrictions apply, 100 lb weight limit
Steps from Silver Spring Metro (Red Line); Giant supermarket in building
Rent range sourced from RentCafe ($2,181-$2,930 for 2BR, 1,044-1,135 sq ft) and Rentable ($2,288-$2,829)
